## Tags
arrows, estimated, indeterminate, data fluctuation, uncertain, forecast, variable, prediction, dynamic, volatile

## Categories
charts, arrows

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/trending-up-down)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TrendingUpDown;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TrendingUpDown { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
